summary: Comprehensive testing of Social/Friends system, Daily Challenges, and Message Privacy features. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Secondary test user created for social interaction tests. Daily challenge (Box Breathing) already completed by test@test.com with 50 XP.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social/Friends system, Daily Challenges, and Message Privacy features fully tested. Friends page has 6 tabs (Feed, Challenges, Friends, Find, Requests, Messages). Daily challenge rotates daily and shows completion status. Message privacy controls work correctly (everyone, friends_only, nobody). Profile page has both Profile Visibility and Message Privacy settings.

friends_page.page_loads: Friends page (/friends) loads with 'Social > Friends' header
friends_page.six_tabs: All 6 tabs present: Feed, Challenges, Friends, Find, Requests, Messages

find_tab.user_discovery: Shows 'People You May Know' and 'Discover People' sections
find_tab.message_buttons: Blue chat icon buttons visible for messaging users

challenges_tab.stats_display: Shows Completed count, Total XP, Day Streak

daily_challenge_backend.get_daily_challenge: GET /api/daily-challenge returns challenge with category, XP, difficulty, completed status
daily_challenge_backend.complete_challenge: POST /api/daily-challenge/complete marks challenge done, returns XP earned
daily_challenge_backend.get_history: GET /api/daily-challenge/history returns completion history with total XP
daily_challenge_backend.get_leaderboard: GET /api/daily-challenge/leaderboard returns ranked users by XP

users_discover_backend.discover_users: GET /api/users/discover returns all platform users with friend/pending status and message_privacy

friends_backend.friend_requests: GET /api/friends/requests returns received and sent requests

message_privacy_backend.privacy_nobody_blocks: POST /api/messages/send returns 403 when recipient has message_privacy='nobody'
message_privacy_backend.privacy_everyone_allows: POST /api/messages/send succeeds when recipient has message_privacy='everyone'

frontend_ui_tested: Dashboard shows 'Today's Challenge' card with challenge title and completion status
Friends page loads with 6 tabs (Feed, Challenges, Friends, Find, Requests, Messages)
Challenges tab shows daily challenge card with category, XP, duration
Challenges tab shows 'Completed!' badge when challenge done
Challenges tab shows stats (Completed count, Total XP, Day Streak)
Leaderboard shows ranked users with XP
Find tab shows search input and user discovery sections
Find tab shows message buttons (blue chat icon) for users
Share button opens share modal with Achievement/Milestone/Tool options
Profile page shows 'Who Can Message You' section with 3 options
Profile message privacy options: Everyone, Friends Only, Nobody
